title: Generalized Covenants
description: Generalized covenants are covenant designs that can express broad constraints over future transaction structure rather than one narrowly defined spending pattern. They provide a useful boundary for comparing flexible introspection mechanisms with restricted covenant proposals such as CTV or vault-specific constructions.

resources.title: Bitcoin Covenants Research Compilation
resources.notes: Defines generalized versus restricted covenants and surveys the main construction families.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech: Covenants
resources.notes: Current technical context for covenant proposals and tradeoffs.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for Script, signatures, and transaction construction.
